translations.en: a balding but distinguished man.
translations.zh: 頭髮漸禿，然氣度不凡之男子。

translations.en: Recognizing you, fear fills the former pirate's eyes.
translations.zh: 他認出了汝，昔日海盜眼中頓時浮現懼色。

translations.en: "What do you want? I thought we had a deal!"
translations.zh: 「汝來此何事？我以為你我早有協議！」

translations.en: "Welcome back, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「歡迎歸來，聖者！」

translations.en: "Welcome, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「歡迎，聖者！」

translations.en: "I am Lord Whitsaber, mayor of this honorable town!"
translations.zh: 「在下乃惠特薩伯爵，此榮譽之城之市長！」

translations.en: "I am entrusted with an honor above all others-that of governing Trinsic, the Town of @Honor!"
translations.zh: 「在下受命治理特林希克——@Honor（榮譽）之城，此乃世間最崇高之榮譽！」

translations.en: "Every citizen of this fine town strives every day to be a living example of honor."
translations.zh: 「此鎮每位市民日日力行，以為榮譽之活典範。」

translations.en: "Of course, thy own example guides us all, Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「汝自身之榜樣，正是吾等最好的引導，聖者！」

translations.en: "I gave you the map. What more do you want?"
translations.zh: 「地圖已給汝了，還要何物？」

translations.en: "All right! If thou wouldst but promise to keep my secret, I'll give thee the map!"
translations.zh: 「好吧！若汝肯承諾為我保密，吾便將地圖交予汝！」

translations.en: "Agreed?"
translations.zh: 「可否？」

translations.en: "What are you insinuating?"
translations.zh: 「汝意欲何指？」

translations.en: "Me, a pirate? Absurd!"
translations.zh: 「我是海盜？荒謬至極！」

translations.en: He laughs out loud...but you sense a trace of fear in his voice!
translations.zh: 他放聲大笑……然汝察覺其聲音中隱含一絲懼意！

translations.en: "Wh--what did Sandy tell you?"
translations.zh: 「那——那個桑迪跟汝說了什麼？」

translations.en: "Did he say I was once a @pirate?"
translations.zh: 「他說我曾是@pirate（海盜）？」

translations.en: "The Rune of Honor? Why, it is on a pedestal in the center of town!"
translations.zh: 「榮譽符文？那放在城中央的台座上！」

translations.en: "Even though the rune is our most prized possession, we do not guard it!"
translations.zh: 「儘管符文是吾等最珍貴之物，吾等並不派人守護它！」

translations.en: "And dost thou know why not?"
translations.zh: 「汝可知為何否？」

translations.en: "The Mantra of Honor? Let me think..."
translations.zh: 「榮譽真言？讓我想想……」

translations.en: "Oh yes, I remember now. It's 'summ.'"
translations.zh: 「哦，想起來了，是『summ』。」

translations.en: "Goodbye, Avatar! Thou hast my thanks!"
translations.zh: 「再見，聖者！感激不盡！」

translations.en: "Truly are thy compassion and honor an example to us all!"
translations.zh: 「汝之慈悲與榮譽，實乃吾等楷模！」

translations.en: "Good $T, Avatar. Return again when thou hast more time to chat!"
translations.zh: 「$T安，聖者。何日再來閒談！」

translations.en: "I beg thy pardon, Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「聖者，請再說一遍？」

translations.en: "Then all is lost!"
translations.zh: 「那便一切皆休！」

translations.en: "Have pity, Avatar, and keep my secret!"
translations.zh: 「聖者，發發慈悲，為我保密！」

translations.en: "I have changed since those dark days, truly I have!"
translations.zh: 「那段黑暗歲月過後，我早已洗心革面，千真萬確！」

translations.en: He seems strangely relieved. "Oh. Well, good, because it isn't true!"
translations.zh: 他似乎奇異地鬆了一口氣。「哦，那便好，因為那根本不是真的！」

translations.en: "Oh." He seems disappointed somehow.
translations.zh: 「哦。」他似乎有些失望。

translations.en: "Because Trinsic is the Town of Honor!"
translations.zh: 「因為特林希克乃榮譽之城！」

translations.en: "None here would be dishonorable enough to steal it."
translations.zh: 「此地無人會無恥至去偷竊它。」

translations.en: "And surely, if any took the rune, they would do the honorable thing and return it afterwards!"
translations.zh: 「即便有人取走符文，亦必會以榮譽之舉將其歸還！」

translations.en: "Oh, thank you, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「哦，多謝汝，聖者。」

translations.en: He hands over his piece of the map.
translations.zh: 他將那片地圖交到汝手中。

translations.en: "I'll rely on thy honor to keep my secret."
translations.zh: 「吾信賴汝之榮譽，望汝為我守密。」

translations.en: "But what more can I do? I cannot change the past!"
translations.zh: 「然我還能如何？往事已無從更改！」

translations.en: "By giving you the map, do I not prove that I have changed my ways?"
translations.zh: 「將地圖交予汝，豈非已證明我已浪子回頭？」

translations.en: "No pirate would willingly give up the key to such a treasure!"
translations.zh: 「哪個海盜會甘願交出通往寶藏的鑰匙！」

translator_notes: 076 Whitsaber: 特林希克市長兼昔日海盜，榮譽主題貫串全篇。避5C trail字。@Honor/@pirate 保留@前綴。
